mapper.select: SELECT ci.cart_item_id, ci.product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.price, ci.quantity, (p.price * ci.quantity) AS sub_total FROM cart_items ci JOIN carts c ON c.cart_id = ci.cart_id JOIN products p ON p.product_id = ci.product_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY ci.cart_item_id

SELECT ci.cart_item_id, ci.product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.price, ci.quantity, (p.price * ci.quantity) AS sub_total FROM cart_items ci JOIN carts c ON c.cart_id = ci.cart_id JOIN products p ON p.product_id = ci.product_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY ci.cart_item_id
SELECT ci.cart_item_id, ci.cart_id, ci.product_id, ci.quantity, ci.added_at FROM cart_items ci JOIN carts c ON c.cart_id = ci.cart_id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} AND ci.product_id = #{productId}
SELECT cart_item_id, cart_id, product_id, quantity, added_at FROM cart_items WHERE cart_item_id = #{cartItemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items ( cart_id, product_id, quantity, added_at ) VALUES ( #{cartId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{addedAt} )
